legacy.content:
# Phase 44-01 Plan: KAPLAY Atomic Component Library Baseline
## Objective
Make the atomic component stack the default implementation path for KAPLAY scenes.
## Tasks
1. Expand `ui/atoms.ts` with reusable button/keycap primitives tied to theme tokens. 2. Expand `ui/molecules.ts` with reusable key-legend and stat/header rows. 3. Expand `ui/organisms.ts` scene shell usage for left command panel and right room brief. 4. Refit `grid.ts` scenes to compose via shared frame helpers instead of scene-local color/layout literals. 5. Keep `first-person.ts` aligned with the same shell conventions. 6. Verify with `kaplay-demo` typecheck/build and parity smoke for `engine-mcp`.
## Files
- `packages/kaplay-demo/src/ui/atoms.ts` - `packages/kaplay-demo/src/ui/molecules.ts` - `packages/kaplay-demo/src/ui/organisms.ts` - `packages/kaplay-demo/src/shared.ts` - `packages/kaplay-demo/src/grid.ts` - `packages/kaplay-demo/src/first-person.ts` - `packages/kaplay-demo/src/ARCHITECTURE.md`
